title: Heteropsis melinonii

The species Heteropsis melinonii is classified under the kingdom Plantae and the phylum Magnoliophyta. This classification is based on the plant's characteristics, such as its leaf structure and growth habit. Heteropsis melinonii is an epiphytic plant, which means it grows on other plants or trees for support.
